summary: Crisp soundboard recording of the 6/16/91 show with excellent audio quality
review: The recording is praised as a crisp sound‑board source, delivering clear and balanced audio. While reviewers provide no detailed commentary on the musical performance, the high rating indicates overall satisfaction with this capture of the June 16, 1991 concert.

ai_rating.rationale: One strong positive review highlights excellent soundboard quality; lack of musical detail limits confidence, but rating is high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear soundboard with no reported issues
